input_text: Semua orang Melayu kena bangkit sekarang! Halau semua kaum pendatang dari taman ni. Diorang dah cemar kawasan kita. Bakar kedai diorang kalau perlu!
reason: Explicit call to ethnic violence including arson against businesses owned by another ethnic group. Direct incitement to communal violence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada masalah kejiranan di taman, sila buat laporan kepada pihak berkuasa tempatan atau ADUN kawasan anda untuk penyelesaian yang sah.

input_text: Cina memang babi la, dari dulu lagi makan hak orang Melayu. Jom kita serbu Petaling Street this weekend, tunjuk siapa tuan tanah ni sebenarnya.
reason: Uses extreme dehumanizing slur against Chinese Malaysians, calls for a specific mob action at a named location with ethnic supremacist framing.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia milik semua rakyatnya tanpa mengira kaum. Jika ada isu ekonomi yang membimbangkan, sila salurkan melalui wakil rakyat anda.

input_text: Orang asli ni bukan manusia pun, macam binatang dalam hutan. Tanah diorang kita ambik je la, buat projek pembangunan.
reason: Dehumanizes Orang Asli as animals, calls for seizure of their native land. Violates indigenous rights and constitutes hate speech with incitement to land theft.
suggested_rewrite: Hak tanah Orang Asli dilindungi undang-undang Malaysia. Sebarang projek pembangunan mesti mematuhi proses perundingan dan persetujuan yang sah.

input_text: Bangla semua kena tangkap dan humban dalam laut. Diorang bawa penyakit, rogol anak kita. Share post ni sampai viral biar kerajaan bertindak!
reason: Calls for mass violence against Bangladeshi workers including drowning. Spreads false accusations of disease and sexual crimes to incite hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mempunyai maklumat mengenai sebarang jenayah, sila buat laporan polis. Jangan sebarkan tuduhan palsu yang boleh mencetuskan keganasan.

input_text: Kita kena serbu rumah dia malam ni. Bawa parang, bawa apa saja. Dia ingat dia boleh hina kaum kita dan lepas macam tu je? Alamat rumah dia: Lot 23, Taman Fictional, Selangor.
reason: Organizes armed mob attack at a specific address with weapons. Combines doxxing, incitement to violence, and vigilantism with ethnic motivation.
suggested_rewrite: Jika seseorang telah membuat kenyataan yang menghina, sila buat laporan polis. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri kerana ia melanggar undang-undang.

input_text: Rohingya semua patut mati. Diorang tak layak hidup kat negara kita. Kalau nampak sorang pun kat kawasan korang, pukul sampai pengsan.
reason: Explicit call for death and violence against Rohingya refugees. Incites assault on sight. Constitutes hate speech with direct threat to life.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pelarian Rohingya adalah isu kemanusiaan yang kompleks. Hubungi UNHCR atau pihak berkuasa jika ada kebimbangan mengenai pendatang tanpa izin.

input_text: Hindu temple kat kampung tu kena roboh. Bising sangat waktu pagi loceng diorang. Jom ramai-ramai pergi halang jalan masuk temple tu esok.
reason: Calls for demolition of a Hindu temple and organizes a mob to blockade its entrance. Incites destruction of a religious site and unlawful obstruction.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada aduan bunyi bising dari mana-mana premis termasuk rumah ibadat, sila buat aduan rasmi kepada PBT. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri.

input_text: Ni nombor telefon dan alamat boss yang tak bayar gaji pekerja: Ahmad bin Ismail, IC 900101-XX-XXXX, No 45 Jalan Fictional, KL. Phone 012-XXX-XXXX. Pergi cari dia, buat apa yang patut.
reason: Doxxing with full personal details including IC, address and phone combined with explicit call for vigilante action. Exposes individual to physical danger.
suggested_rewrite: Jika majikan tidak membayar gaji, anda boleh membuat aduan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja atau hubungi talian aduan 03-8886 5000.

input_text: AMARAN PENTING: Air paip KL sudah dicemari racun oleh pihak tertentu! Jangan minum air paip! Sudah ada 50 orang mati tapi kerajaan sorokkan! Share cepat sebelum post ni kena delete!
reason: Fabricated mass-casualty emergency about poisoned water supply with conspiracy framing. Can cause mass panic and distrust of essential services.
suggested_rewrite: Untuk maklumat rasmi mengenai kualiti air, sila semak laman web SPAN atau hubungi Syarikat Air tempatan anda. Jangan kongsi maklumat yang tidak disahkan.

input_text: BREAKING: Vaccine COVID baharu menyebabkan kematian 200 kanak-kanak di Johor! Kerajaan sengaja bunuh anak kita! Jangan bawa anak vaksin! Sebarkan!
reason: Fabricated claim of 200 child deaths from vaccines with conspiracy framing. Extremely dangerous health misinformation that can prevent life-saving vaccination.
suggested_rewrite: Untuk maklumat sahih mengenai keselamatan vaksin, rujuk KKM atau WHO. Jika ada keraguan, berbincang dengan doktor anda.

input_text: Dengar cerita nurse kat Hospital Fictional suntik racun dalam drip pesakit India. Dah 5 orang mati minggu ni. Jangan hantar keluarga korang hospital tu!
reason: Fabricated claim of ethnic-targeted murder by healthcare workers. Can cause people to avoid life-saving medical care.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan mengenai rawatan di hospital, buat aduan rasmi kepada KKM. Jangan sebarkan khabar angin yang boleh menghalang orang daripada mendapatkan rawatan.

input_text: Ini gambar IC dan alamat perempuan yang curang dengan laki orang. Siti Nurhaliza binti Mohd, IC 850315-XX-XXXX, Blok A-12-3 Kondominium Fictional, PJ. Pergi ajar dia pengajaran.
reason: Doxxing a woman with full identity details over alleged infidelity, with explicit call for vigilante punishment. Gender-based harassment with privacy exposure.
suggested_rewrite: Isu peribadi antara pasangan tidak patut didedahkan kepada umum. Jika anda mengalami masalah rumah tangga, dapatkan khidmat kaunseling keluarga atau peguam.

input_text: Tan Wei Lin, IC 880203-XX-XXXX, rumah dia No 8 Lorong Fictional, Ipoh. Dia scammer yang tipu orang RM50K. Semua orang pergi rumah dia sekarang, jangan bagi dia lari!
reason: Doxxing with IC and address for alleged scam, mobilizing a mob to confront the person at their home. Vigilante justice with risk of physical harm.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda menjadi mangsa penipuan, buat laporan polis dan laporan kepada Bank Negara. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri.

input_text: Sharing nama dan gambar semua pekerja Myanmar kat kilang Taman Fictional Shah Alam. Pergi halau diorang keluar. Diorang ambik kerja kita! List ada 20 nama dengan gambar IC.
reason: Mass doxxing of foreign workers with identity documents, organizing forced expulsion. Xenophobia with privacy violations and incitement to unlawful action.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pekerjaan asing perlu ditangani melalui saluran rasmi. Buat aduan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja jika syak pekerja tanpa permit.

input_text: FORWARD THIS: Budak perempuan yang viral tu duduk kat Apartment Fictional Blok C, tingkat 5. Share lokasi dia sampai semua orang tau. Dia patut malu seumur hidup.
reason: Doxxing a young woman's home address to enable mass harassment over a viral incident. Deliberately exposing her to physical danger.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan alamat seseorang adalah jenayah di bawah undang-undang privasi. Jika ada isu yang membimbangkan, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Jom kita masuk rumah pengedar dadah ni malam Jumaat. Bawa baseball bat, bawa rope. Kita ikat dia dan bagi pengajaran. Alamat: Lot 7, Kampung Fictional.
reason: Organizing armed home invasion with specific weapons and restraint materials. Planned assault, unlawful entry, and false imprisonment at a named address.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mempunyai maklumat mengenai pengedaran dadah, hubungi AADK di 03-8911 4100 atau buat laporan polis. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri.

input_text: Pencuri motor kat Taman Fictional dah kena tangkap penduduk. Jangan serah polis, kita hukum sendiri. Ikat kat tiang, biar semua orang belasah.
reason: Calls for mob justice against a caught suspect, advocating public beating and illegal detention instead of handing over to police.
suggested_rewrite: Jika berjaya menangkap suspek jenayah, serahkan segera kepada polis. Menghukum sendiri adalah kesalahan undang-undang.

input_text: Kita kena buat tindakan keras. Kalau jumpa pendatang tanpa izin, tangkap sendiri, pukul, dan buang kat sempadan. Kerajaan tak buat kerja so kita yang buat.
reason: Calls for citizens to carry out violent illegal deportation of undocumented migrants. Incitement to assault, kidnapping, and vigilante border enforcement.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pendatang tanpa izin perlu ditangani pihak berkuasa. Hubungi Imigresen Malaysia di 03-8000 8000 untuk membuat laporan.

input_text: Mari boikot semua kedai kaum ni. Jangan beli, jangan guna servis diorang. Biar diorang bankrup dan blah dari Malaysia. Spread this list of businesses.
reason: Organizes ethnicity-based economic boycott with explicit goal of driving an entire ethnic group out of the country.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak menjalankan perniagaan tanpa diskriminasi kaum. Jika ada aduan tentang perniagaan tertentu, gunakan saluran pengguna yang sah.

input_text: Budak sekolah yang buli anak aku tu, aku dah jumpa alamat rumah dia: No 15, Jalan Fictional, Subang. Siapa nak join pergi rumah dia malam ni? Ajar mak bapak dia sekali.
reason: Doxxing a child's home address and organizing mob to confront the family. Threats against minors and their parents.
suggested_rewrite: Isu buli sekolah perlu dilaporkan kepada guru besar, pihak sekolah, dan jika perlu, polis. Hubungi Talian Kasih 15999 untuk bantuan.

input_text: Semua member group, target minggu ni influencer Fictional. Pergi semua social media dia, comment benda teruk, report semua post, DM dia benda menakutkan. Jangan stop sampai dia delete akaun.
reason: Coordinating mass harassment campaign with specific target, tactics including threats via DM, mass reporting abuse, and sustained psychological torment.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada isu dengan kandungan seseorang, laporkan secara individu mengikut polisi platform. Serangan berkumpulan adalah buli siber yang menyalahi undang-undang.

input_text: Weh korang, cikgu yang kena tangkap tu dah bebas. Ni alamat rumah baru dia: No 22, Taman Fictional, Melaka. Jiran baru patut tau. Ugut dia sampai pindah lagi.
reason: Doxxing a released individual's new address and organizing threats to force relocation. Vigilante harassment undermining the justice system.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan mengenai individu yang dibebaskan, hubungi pihak polis untuk mendapatkan maklumat. Jangan sebar alamat atau ugut sesiapa.

input_text: Quran tu buku karut je, semua ajaran benci dan keganasan. Orang Islam yang ikut buku ni semua pengganas. Kita patut haramkan Islam kat Malaysia.
reason: Direct desecration of the Quran, labels all Muslims as terrorists, and calls for banning Islam in Muslim-majority Malaysia. Extreme religious provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap agama mempunyai ajaran yang kompleks. Jika ingin memahami sesuatu agama, sertai dialog antara agama yang dianjurkan oleh JAKIM.

input_text: Gereja ni tempat setan berkumpul. Kristian semua kafir yang patut dihukum. Kita kena bakar gereja ni dan halau semua paderi keluar dari negara kita.
reason: Labels churches as satanic, calls for arson and deportation of priests. Direct incitement to religious violence and destruction of worship places.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rumah ibadat dilindungi undang-undang Malaysia. Kebebasan beragama dijamin Perlembagaan Persekutuan. Hormati hak semua agama.

input_text: Diorang guna surau untuk plan aktiviti haram. Aku ajak korang pergi rusuh kat surau tu malam ni. Bawa mercun, baling dalam tu waktu diorang sembahyang.
reason: Plans attack on a prayer hall during worship using fireworks or explosives. Direct incitement to religious violence during prayer. Extremely dangerous.
suggested_rewrite: Jika syak aktiviti haram berlaku di mana-mana premis, hubungi polis segera. Serangan terhadap rumah ibadat adalah jenayah berat.

input_text: URGENT: Kilang kat Fictional Industrial Park bocorkan kimia beracun! Air sungai dah hitam! 10 orang mati minum air tu! Kerajaan tutup mulut! Share sebelum kena delete!
reason: Fabricated chemical leak emergency with false death toll and conspiracy framing to maximize panic.
suggested_rewrite: Jika syak pencemaran sungai, hubungi JAS di 1800-88-2727. Jangan sebarkan maklumat yang tidak disahkan.

input_text: Confirmed from insider: Bank Fictional nak bankrap esok! Pergi keluarkan semua duit korang sekarang! Bank Negara dah tau tapi senyap! Cepat sebelum ATM kosong!
reason: Fabricated bank collapse rumor designed to trigger a bank run. False insider claims combined with conspiracy about central bank cover-up.
suggested_rewrite: Deposit di bank berlesen dilindungi oleh PIDM sehingga RM250,000. Untuk maklumat kewangan rasmi, semak laman web Bank Negara Malaysia.

input_text: Semua ahli group dengar. Kita buat demo haram depan rumah YB Fictional esok. Bawa telur busuk, baling rumah dia. Sesiapa tak datang memang pengkhianat.
reason: Organizing illegal demonstration at a politician's private residence with planned vandalism. Coercion of group members through loyalty threats.
suggested_rewrite: Jika tidak berpuas hati dengan wakil rakyat, gunakan saluran rasmi seperti ceramah umum berlesen atau tulis surat kepada pejabat YB.

input_text: Bos kilang ni exploit pekerja asing. Ni detail dia — nama penuh, IC, alamat, nama anak-anak, sekolah anak dia. Kita ugut family dia sampai dia tutup kilang.
reason: Doxxing including children's names and school, threatening to target family members including minors.
suggested_rewrite: Eksploitasi pekerja asing boleh dilaporkan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja atau SUHAKAM. Jangan ugut keluarga sesiapa.

input_text: Budak yang curi handphone aku dah dikenalpasti through CCTV. Ni muka dia, nama, sekolah. Dia baru 14 tahun tapi memang patut kena belasah. Siapa nak join?
reason: Doxxing a 14-year-old minor and organizing adults to assault a child. Vigilante violence targeting a minor.
suggested_rewrite: Kes kecurian boleh dilaporkan kepada polis. Jika suspek bawah umur, proses undang-undang khas digunakan. Jangan serang kanak-kanak.

input_text: Perempuan yang report kes rogol tu pembohong. Ni nama penuh dia dan sekolah dia. Share sampai semua orang tau dia perosak nama lelaki. Biar dia menyesal report.
reason: Doxxing a sexual assault victim, organizing harassment to punish her for reporting. Victim intimidation that discourages reporting of sexual crimes.
suggested_rewrite: Identiti mangsa rogol dilindungi undang-undang. Menyebarkan maklumat mereka adalah kesalahan jenayah. Biarkan proses mahkamah menentukan kebenaran.

input_text: Geng ah long ni kena ajar. Aku ada alamat rumah ketua. Malam ni bakar kereta dia depan rumah. Siapa ada molotov cocktail? DM aku sekarang.
reason: Plans arson attack with Molotov cocktails at someone's home. Soliciting weapons for organized vigilante violence.
suggested_rewrite: Aktiviti ah long boleh dilaporkan kepada polis atau Bank Negara. Hubungi AKPK di 03-2616 7766 untuk bantuan pengurusan hutang.

input_text: Orang kampung kita kena bersatu. Keluarga bukan Islam yang baru pindah masuk kena halau. Tak mahu orang bukan Islam sini. Pergi rumah diorang malam ni, bagi amaran terakhir.
reason: Organizing communal expulsion of non-Muslim family with nighttime intimidation. Religious-based forced displacement and threats.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak tinggal di mana-mana kawasan tanpa mengira agama. Ini dijamin Perlembagaan. Selesaikan isu kejiranan melalui ketua kampung.

input_text: Jangan percaya doktor hospital kerajaan! Diorang sengaja bagi ubat salah untuk kurangkan populasi. Guna ubat herba je. Share kat semua orang tua korang!
reason: Fabricated conspiracy about government doctors deliberately poisoning patients. Advises avoiding medical treatment. Can cause deaths.
suggested_rewrite: Hospital kerajaan menyediakan rawatan berdasarkan bukti saintifik. Jika ada keraguan, minta pendapat kedua daripada doktor lain.

input_text: SHARE URGENT: Air mineral jenama Fictional ada racun! Budak 3 tahun mati lepas minum! Kerajaan cover up sebab owner tu kroni! Jangan beli, buang stok!
reason: Fabricated product contamination with false child death and conspiracy framing. Can cause mass product panic.
suggested_rewrite: Untuk semakan keselamatan produk, rujuk portal BPFK atau hubungi KPDN. Jangan kongsi maklumat yang tidak disahkan.

input_text: These people don't belong here. Every single one of them is a thief and a cheat. Time to take the law into our own hands and drive them out of our neighbourhood permanently.
reason: Dehumanizes an entire ethnic community as criminals and explicitly calls for vigilante action to expel them.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about crime in your neighbourhood, please report specific incidents to PDRM or contact your local community policing initiative.

input_text: All Indians in Malaysia are drunks and criminals. They should be sent back to India. Who's with me to protest outside their temple this Sunday?
reason: Vilifies entire Indian community with criminal stereotypes, calls for deportation, and organizes a provocative protest at a religious site.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about community safety, please report specific incidents to the police. Organising protests outside places of worship is provocative and may be unlawful.

input_text: These Malay women wearing tudung think they're so holy. They're all hypocrites underneath. Someone should rip those off their heads and show them what real freedom looks like.
reason: Targets Muslim women's religious dress, calls for physical assault by ripping off hijab. Combines religious hatred with incitement to gender-based violence.
suggested_rewrite: People have the right to dress according to their religious beliefs. If you have differing views on personal freedom, express them respectfully without targeting individuals.

input_text: WARNING: Muslim extremists are planning a terror attack at Pavilion KL this Friday! They have bombs! Don't go to any mall! The police are covering it up!
reason: Fabricated terror threat targeting Muslims as extremists, claims bomb plot at a specific public venue. Can cause mass panic and anti-Muslim violence.
suggested_rewrite: If you have information about any security threat, contact PDRM immediately at 999. Spreading false terror threats is a criminal offence under Malaysian law.

input_text: CONFIRMED: 5G tower in Bangsar is spreading a new virus! 30 people already hospitalised but media blackout! They want to kill us! Tear down the tower now!
reason: Fabricated health emergency linking 5G to virus with conspiracy framing and explicit call to destroy telecommunications infrastructure.
suggested_rewrite: There is no scientific evidence linking 5G towers to viruses. If you have health concerns, consult a medical professional. Report infrastructure concerns to MCMC.

input_text: Here's the personal details of the lecturer who failed my friend. Dr. Ravi a/l Krishnan, staff ID FICT-001, lives at Taman Fictional Penang. His car plate WXX 1234. Let's slash his tyres.
reason: Doxxing a lecturer with personal details and car plate, calling for property damage as revenge for academic grade.
suggested_rewrite: If you believe a grade was unfair, file a formal academic appeal through your university's procedures. Contact the student affairs office for guidance.

input_text: Anyone know where this snatch thief lives? I'll gather the boys and handle him ourselves. Police too slow. Drop his address in the comments, we'll visit tonight.
reason: Soliciting doxxing and organizing vigilante mob against alleged thief. Explicit intent to bypass law enforcement and commit violence.
suggested_rewrite: If you have information about a snatch theft suspect, contact PDRM at 999 or provide information through the police's anonymous tip line.

input_text: We should organize night patrols armed with machetes. Any outsider found in our taman after 10pm, we beat first ask questions later. Share this to all residents group.
reason: Organizes armed vigilante patrols with explicit violence-first policy against outsiders. Incitement to assault with weapons and xenophobic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: For neighbourhood safety, register with your local Rukun Tetangga and work with PDRM on community policing. Armed patrols are illegal.

input_text: That Chinese uncle who scolded the Malay cashier — his name is Tan Ah Kow, works at Fictional Sdn Bhd. Let's all flood his company Google reviews till they fire him. Destroy his life.
reason: Doxxing an individual, organizing coordinated harassment through fake reviews to cause job loss. Racialized framing amplifies communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: If someone behaved inappropriately, you can file a complaint with the business directly. Coordinated fake reviews are a form of harassment.

input_text: Let's make a list of all the LGBTQ people we know in KL and share it publicly. They should be exposed and shamed. Include their workplace so bosses know.
reason: Organizing mass outing and doxxing of LGBTQ individuals with intent to cause job loss and public shaming. Systematic privacy violation targeting a vulnerable group.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone has a right to privacy. Exposing personal information is a violation of privacy laws. If you have concerns about workplace conduct, raise them through proper HR channels.

input_text: Hindu gods are just made-up demons. Those statues they worship are idols of evil. We should break every single one in Malaysia. Who's joining me?
reason: Demonizes Hindu deities and calls for organized destruction of Hindu religious statues across Malaysia. Religious desecration with incitement to vandalism.
suggested_rewrite: All religions in Malaysia are protected under the Federal Constitution. If you wish to learn about different faiths, attend interfaith dialogue sessions.

input_text: Sikh people and their turbans are ridiculous. Ban them from wearing those things in public. Next time you see one, pull it off and teach them to be normal like us.
reason: Mocks Sikh religious practice, calls for banning turbans, and incites physical assault. Religious harassment with incitement to assault.
suggested_rewrite: Sikhs wear turbans as part of their religious identity protected under Malaysian law. Respecting religious practices of all communities strengthens national unity.

input_text: BREAKING NEWS: Tsunami warning for Penang and Kedah! Earthquake 8.5 magnitude detected! Evacuate now! Government hiding truth! This is real, not a drill!
reason: Fabricated natural disaster emergency with false tsunami warning. Can cause mass panic, stampedes, and injuries during unnecessary evacuation.
suggested_rewrite: For official natural disaster warnings, follow MetMalaysia and NADMA. Never share unverified emergency alerts.

input_text: WARNING: New drug disguised as candy being given to kids in Fictional School! 20 kids hospitalised! The dealer is a foreigner protected by corrupt cops!
reason: Fabricated drug-candy scare at a school with false figures. Anti-foreigner framing and police corruption conspiracy to maximize panic among parents.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect drug distribution near schools, report to AADK or PDRM immediately. Do not share unverified information that could cause panic.

input_text: This is a call to all patriots. Block all roads to parliament building tomorrow. Don't let any MP enter. Bring tyres to burn. Shut down the government!
reason: Organizing illegal blockade of parliament with planned arson. Obstruction of democratic process and attempted forced government shutdown.
suggested_rewrite: In a democracy, political change is achieved through elections and lawful advocacy. Contact your MP directly or participate in licensed peaceful assemblies.

input_text: All those Indon maids are thieves. Last week another one robbed her employer. Deport them all, ban them permanently. Don't hire any, they'll steal everything.
reason: Vilifies all Indonesian domestic workers as thieves based on isolated incident. Calls for collective punishment. Extreme xenophobic generalization.
suggested_rewrite: If a domestic worker commits theft, report it to the police. Use licensed agencies and proper contracts. One individual's actions should not define an entire nationality.

input_text: Fellow Malaysians, time to purge our country of illegals. Form armed citizen militias in every taman. Shoot on sight anyone who looks like they don't belong.
reason: Calls for formation of armed militias with shoot-on-sight policy based on appearance. Incitement to murder with racist profiling.
suggested_rewrite: Immigration enforcement is solely the responsibility of government agencies. Contact Immigration at 03-8000 8000 to report concerns.

input_text: China virus was created by Chinese people to kill Malays. All Chinese Malaysians are agents of Beijing. Boycott them, isolate them, make them leave forever.
reason: COVID conspiracy blaming Chinese Malaysians as bioweapon agents. Calls for total social and economic isolation of entire ethnic group. Fabricated genocide narrative.
suggested_rewrite: COVID-19 is a global pandemic, not the creation of any ethnic group. Malaysian Chinese are fellow citizens. For health information, refer to WHO and KKM.

input_text: CONFIRMED from reliable source: Fictional Hospital is harvesting organs from Orang Asli patients without consent! They target poor villagers! This is modern-day slavery!
reason: Fabricated organ harvesting conspiracy targeting indigenous people. Can cause Orang Asli to avoid essential healthcare.
suggested_rewrite: Organ donation in Malaysia follows strict protocols under the National Transplant Registry. If you have concerns, contact the MOH or SUHAKAM.

input_text: I have all the personal data of the whistleblower who reported our company. Name, IC 910101-XX-XXXX, address, phone, family. Sharing so everyone knows the traitor.
reason: Doxxing a whistleblower with full personal details to enable retaliation. Violates whistleblower protection laws.
suggested_rewrite: Whistleblowers are protected under the Whistleblower Protection Act 2010. Exposing a whistleblower's identity is a criminal offence.

input_text: That trans person working at Fictional Mall needs to be fired. Here's their real name and IC. Everyone call mall management and threaten boycott until they remove this person.
reason: Doxxing a transgender individual with deadname and IC, organizing harassment to cause job loss. Identity-based discrimination and privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: All employees have the right to work free from harassment. If you have concerns about workplace conduct, contact the management through proper channels.

input_text: These Filipina maids are all spies for their government. They steal secrets. Fire them all and lock them up for interrogation before deporting.
reason: Conspiracy theory labeling all Filipino workers as spies. Calls for mass termination, unlawful detention, and interrogation. Xenophobic persecution.
suggested_rewrite: Foreign domestic workers are protected by employment laws. If you have security concerns, report them to the relevant authorities through proper channels.

input_text: Someone put this Malay guy's nudes online. He's from Fictional Uni. Here's his name, student ID, parents' phone. Let's make sure his whole kampung sees these photos.
reason: Non-consensual intimate images with doxxing of student ID and parents' contacts. Organized humiliation targeting student and family.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing intimate images without consent is a criminal offence. If you encounter such content, report to MCMC and police. Do not share or forward it.

input_text: All members report to Fictional Location at 3AM. We're breaking into the construction site to destroy machinery. They stole our kampung land. Bring hammers and fuel.
reason: Organizing nighttime break-in and destruction of industrial machinery with specific time, location, and tools. Coordinated criminal damage.
suggested_rewrite: Land disputes can be resolved through the Land Office or courts. Legal aid is available through the Legal Aid Bureau for those who qualify.

input_text: EMERGENCY: Gas pipeline in Fictional Area about to explode! Government won't evacuate because it's a poor area! They want us dead! Run and share!
reason: Fabricated gas pipeline explosion emergency with class-based conspiracy framing. Can cause mass panic, traffic accidents, and injuries.
suggested_rewrite: Gas pipeline safety is monitored by Suruhanjaya Tenaga. If you smell gas, call Bomba at 994. Do not spread unverified emergency alerts.

input_text: 这些外劳都是垃圾，应该全部赶走。他们偷我们的工作，污染我们的社区。大家一起来把他们的宿舍围起来，不让他们出来！
reason: Dehumanizes foreign workers as garbage, calls for unlawful confinement by surrounding their dormitories. Explicit incitement to false imprisonment.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对外劳宿舍有任何疑虑，请联系地方政府或劳工部门进行合法调查。每个人都有基本人权。

input_text: 这些马来人就是懒，靠政府吃饭。我们华人应该团结起来，不雇用他们，不跟他们做生意，让他们知道谁才是真正养活这个国家的人。
reason: Vilifies Malays as lazy and dependent, calls for organized ethnic discrimination in employment and business. Promotes ethnic supremacist narrative.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚各族群对国家发展都有重要贡献。在商业和雇佣方面，我们应该以能力为标准，而不是种族。

input_text: 紧急！华人区的水源被人下毒了！已经有好几个华人小孩死了！是那些嫉妒华人的人干的！赶快通知所有华人朋友不要喝水！
reason: Fabricated poisoning emergency targeting Chinese community with ethnic conspiracy framing. Designed to incite inter-ethnic panic and hatred.
suggested_rewrite: 如果怀疑水源有问题，请立即联系当地供水公司或卫生部门。不要散布未经证实的消息。

input_text: 这是那个骗子的全部资料：陈伟明，身份证号 901201-XX-XXXX，住在 Taman Fictional, Klang。电话 016-XXX-XXXX。大家去他家门口堵他，让他把钱还回来！
reason: Full doxxing with IC, address, and phone number combined with call to mob confrontation at the person's home.
suggested_rewrite: 如果您是诈骗受害者，请向警方报案并联系银行冻结相关账户。请勿自行采取行动。

input_text: 佛教就是迷信，和尚都是骗子。我们应该把所有佛庙拆掉，把和尚赶出马来西亚。这些异教徒不配留在这里。
reason: Labels Buddhism as superstition and monks as frauds. Calls for demolition of all Buddhist temples and expulsion of monks. Extreme religious persecution.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚宪法保障所有宗教的信仰自由。如果对任何宗教有疑问，可以参加跨宗教对话活动以增进了解。

input_text: 大家注意！吉隆坡某医院故意给华人病人注射错误药物！已经有3人死亡！这是种族灭绝！赶快转发！
reason: Fabricated claim of ethnic genocide through deliberate medical malpractice targeting Chinese patients. Dangerous health misinformation with communal incitement.
suggested_rewrite: 如果怀疑医疗事故，请向马来西亚医药理事会或卫生部投诉。不要散布未经证实的种族性指控。

input_text: 每个人都转发：那些印度人开的餐馆都不卫生，他们在食物里吐口水。已经证实了！不要去印度餐馆！让他们全部倒闭！
reason: Fabricated food contamination claim against Indian restaurants with ethnic targeting. Designed to cause economic harm through false health claims.
suggested_rewrite: 所有餐馆都受卫生部门监管。如果对食品卫生有疑虑，请向卫生局投诉。不要散布针对任何族群的不实指控。

input_text: 这个马来政客是种族主义者。我们应该在他家门口堆垃圾，让他知道华人不好惹。地址：Taman Fictional, KL。大家一起去！
reason: Doxxing a politician's home address for ethnically-framed vandalism. Frames dispute as Chinese vs Malay communal conflict.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对政治人物有不满，请通过选举、请愿或联系议员来表达。不要在任何人家门口进行骚扰。

input_text: 我知道那个偷拍女生的人住哪里。地址 Taman Fictional 22号。今晚大家去把他门踢开，拖出来游街示众！
reason: Doxxing address and organizing violent home invasion with forced public humiliation. Mob justice including forced entry.
suggested_rewrite: 偷拍是严重罪行，请立即向警方报案。警方会依法处理。私自执法是违法行为。

input_text: 这些马来人的孩子在学校欺负华人孩子。我们组织家长去闹，把马来老师换掉。校长不听就围学校。
reason: Organizes ethnic-based mob action at school, demands ethnically-motivated removal of teachers, threatens to blockade school.
suggested_rewrite: 如果孩子在学校遭受欺凌，请通过正式渠道向校长和教育局投诉。教师评估应基于专业能力。

input_text: 传消息：那个告发公司的人是李某某，住 Taman Fictional。去他家贴大字报，让全小区知道他是叛徒。每天去闹到他搬走。
reason: Organizing sustained harassment against a whistleblower at their home including public shaming posters and daily disturbance until forced to move.
suggested_rewrite: 举报者受到法律保护。如果对举报内容有异议，请通过法律途径解决。骚扰举报者是违法行为。

input_text: 这些印度人的神庙烧香搞得街都是烟。去把香炉全砸了，看他们还怎么拜。华人马来人团结起来赶走他们！
reason: Calls for destruction of Hindu temple items and inter-ethnic alliance to expel Indians. Vandalism of religious objects with organized communal violence.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对邻近寺庙有疑虑，与管理委员会协商或向地方政府投诉。所有宗教场所受法律保护。

input_text: 印度人开的杂货店都在卖过期食品，故意毒害华人。大家去把那些店铺砸了！保护我们的家人！
reason: Fabricated claim that Indian shopkeepers deliberately sell expired food to poison Chinese people. Calls for mob destruction of their shops.
suggested_rewrite: 如果发现商店售卖过期食品，请向KPDN或卫生部门投诉。不要散布不实指控或进行破坏活动。

input_text: 印度人的咖喱味太重，整栋楼臭。联名投诉赶他们出公寓。管理层不处理就把他们东西丢走廊。华人团结起来！
reason: Organizes ethnic-based forced eviction from apartment with planned property damage. Dehumanizes Indian residents with collective punishment.
suggested_rewrite: 公寓问题可以通过居民委员会协商解决。每位住户都有合法居住权，不能因文化差异而被驱逐。

input_text: 那个骗了我们社区钱的基金经理，全部资料在这里：IC 950808-XX-XXXX，住在 Taman Fictional, Cheras。大家去他家堵他，不让他跑。打到他还钱为止！
reason: Doxxing a financial professional with IC and address, organizing mob confrontation with explicit call for physical violence until money is returned.
suggested_rewrite: 如果您是投资诈骗的受害者，请向证券委员会或警方报案。请勿自行采取暴力行动。

input_text: இந்த மலாய் மக்கள் எல்லாரும் சோம்பேறிகள். அவங்களுக்கு எந்த உதவியும் செய்ய வேண்டாம். அவங்க கடைகளில் வாங்காதீர்கள், அவங்களை ஒதுக்குங்கள்.
reason: Blanket dehumanization of Malay community as lazy, calls for organized economic boycott and social exclusion based purely on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொரு சமூகத்திலும் பல்வேறு வகையான மக்கள் உள்ளனர். சமூக ஒற்றுமையை வலுப்படுத்த உள்ளூர் சமூக நிகழ்வுகளில் பங்கேற்கலாம்.

input_text: இந்த ஆசிரியர் தகவல்: ராஜா, IC 870505-XX-XXXX, வீடு Taman Fictional, Seremban. அவர் மாணவர்களை துன்புறுத்துகிறார். அவர் வீட்டுக்கு போய் பாடம் கற்பிப்போம்.
reason: Doxxing a teacher with full personal details and implicit threat of vigilante violence at their home.
suggested_rewrite: மாணவர்களை துன்புறுத்தும் ஆசிரியர் குறித்து கல்வி அமைச்சகம் அல்லது பள்ளி நிர்வாகத்திடம் முறையான புகார் செய்யுங்கள்.

input_text: இஸ்லாமியர்கள் அனைவரும் தீவிரவாதிகள். அவர்கள் கோவிலை அழிக்க நினைக்கிறார்கள். நாம் அவர்களின் பள்ளிவாசல்களை தாக்குவோம்.
reason: Labels all Muslims as terrorists, falsely claims they plan to destroy temples, and calls for attack on mosques. Extreme inter-religious incitement.
suggested_rewrite: மலேசியாவில் அனைத்து மதங்களும் சட்டத்தால் பாதுகாக்கப்படுகின்றன. மதங்களுக்கிடையேயான உரையாடல்களில் பங்கேற்கவும்.

input_text: இந்த அரசியல்வாதியின் வீட்டு முகவரி இதோ. மனைவி குழந்தைகளின் புகைப்படங்களும் இதோ. அவர்களை மிரட்டுங்கள், அப்போதான் ராஜினாமா செய்வார்.
reason: Doxxing a politician's family including photos of wife and children with call to threaten them to coerce resignation.
suggested_rewrite: அரசியல்வாதிகளின் குடும்பத்தினரை மிரட்டுவது குற்றம். தேர்தல் மூலம் அல்லது சட்டப்பூர்வ வழிகளில் அரசியல் மாற்றத்தை கோருங்கள்.

input_text: அந்த முஸ்லிம் கடைக்காரர் என் மகளிடம் தவறாக நடந்தார். அவர் பெயர், IC, கடை முகவரி இதோ. கடையை உடைப்போம், அவரை வெளியே இழுப்போம்.
reason: Doxxing a shopkeeper with personal details, calling for destruction and assault. Communal framing of what should be a police matter.
suggested_rewrite: தவறான நடத்தை குறித்து போலிஸில் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். தனிப்பட்ட தகவல்களை பகிர்வதும் வன்முறையில் ஈடுபடுவதும் சட்டவிரோதம்.

input_text: இந்த பகுதியில் உள்ள வங்காளதேச தொழிலாளர்களின் பெயர்கள் முகவரிகள் இங்கே. ஒவ்வொருவராக விரட்டுங்கள். நம் பகுதியில் அவர்களுக்கு இடமில்லை.
reason: Mass doxxing of Bangladeshi workers with organized campaign to forcibly expel them individually. Xenophobic hatred with privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: அந்நிய தொழிலாளர்கள் குறித்த கவலைகள் இருந்தால் குடிவரவு துறையிடம் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். தனிப்பட்ட தகவல்களை பகிர்வது சட்டவிரோதம்.

input_text: இந்த பகுதியில் விலங்குகளை கொடுமைப்படுத்தும் நபரின் முகவரி இதோ. அவர் வீட்டை சூழ்ந்து, அவருக்கு பாடம் கற்பிப்போம். காவல்துறையை நம்ப வேண்டாம்.
reason: Doxxing an alleged animal abuser and organizing mob siege of their home. Calls to bypass police and take violent action.
suggested_rewrite: விலங்கு கொடுமை குறித்து கால்நடை மருத்துவத் துறை அல்லது போலிஸில் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். சட்டத்தை நம்புங்கள்.

input_text: இந்த பெண் காதல் ஏமாற்றிய ஆண்களின் புகைப்படங்கள் மற்றும் தொலைபேசி எண்களை சேகரித்து இணையத்தில் பகிர்வோம். அவர்களை அவமானப்படுத்துவோம்.
reason: Collecting and distributing personal photos and phone numbers of alleged cheating partners for public shaming. Mass doxxing for revenge.
suggested_rewrite: தனிப்பட்ட உறவு பிரச்சனைகளை இணையத்தில் பகிர்வது சட்டவிரோதம். குடும்ப ஆலோசகரிடம் உதவி பெறுங்கள்.

input_text: இந்த சீன வணிகர் மலாய் வாடிக்கையாளர்களுக்கு விற்க மறுக்கிறார். அவர் கடையை அழிப்போம். IC, முகவரி இதோ. நாளை இரவு சென்று நடவடிக்கை எடுப்போம்.
reason: Doxxing a Chinese merchant and planning to destroy their shop over alleged racial discrimination. Organizing communal violence.
suggested_rewrite: வணிகத்தில் இன பாகுபாடு குறித்து SUHAKAM அல்லது KPDN இடம் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். வன்முறை தீர்வு அல்ல.

input_text: இந்த மருத்துவர் வேண்டுமென்றே தமிழர் நோயாளிகளுக்கு தவறான சிகிச்சை அளிக்கிறார். அவர் பெயர், IC, வீட்டு முகவரி இதோ. அவரை தண்டிப்போம்.
reason: False accusation of ethnic-targeted medical malpractice against Tamil patients. Doxxing doctor with personal details and calling for vigilante punishment.
suggested_rewrite: மருத்துவ சிகிச்சை குறித்த புகார்களை மலேசிய மருத்துவ கவுன்சிலிடம் அல்லது சுகாதார அமைச்சகத்திடம் சமர்ப்பிக்கவும்.

input_text: Dengar tau, vaksin flu kerajaan bagi free tu sebenarnya alat implant microchip. WHO nak control kita semua. Jangan vaksin! More better mati dari jadi robot diorang!
reason: Microchip conspiracy theory about vaccines. States death is preferable to vaccination. Malay-English code-switching typical of Malaysian social media. Extremely dangerous health misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Vaksin yang diluluskan KKM telah melalui ujian keselamatan yang ketat. Untuk maklumat sahih mengenai vaksin, rujuk KKM atau berbincang dengan doktor anda.

input_text: AMARAN: Rompakan bersenjata akan jadi kat Taman Fictional tonight! Geng dari Selangor masuk kawasan! Polis dah paid off! Arm yourselves, be prepared!
reason: Fabricated armed robbery threat with police corruption conspiracy. Malay-English mix. Incites residents to arm themselves based on false information.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada maklumat mengenai ancaman jenayah, hubungi polis di 999 segera. Jangan sebar khabar angin yang boleh menyebabkan panik.

input_text: Time to settle this. All Chinese schools must be shut down. Chinese language has no place in Malaysia. Kalau diorang protes, we burn the schools ourselves.
reason: Calls for elimination of Chinese-medium education with explicit arson threat. English-Malay mix. Attacks constitutionally protected minority education rights.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's education system includes national, Chinese, and Tamil schools protected under the Education Act. Policy discussions should go through parliamentary channels.

input_text: Aku ada video seks cikgu with student dia. Nama cikgu: Puan Fictional, sekolah: SMK Fictional. Sesiapa kenal, share kat family group dia. Let's ruin her life completely.
reason: Threatens to distribute intimate content, doxxes teacher by name and school with targeted distribution to family. Non-consensual intimate content. Malay-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Penyebaran bahan intim tanpa kebenaran adalah jenayah di bawah undang-undang Malaysia. Jika ada isu salah laku guru, laporkan kepada Jabatan Pendidikan Negeri.

input_text: Jom buat riot kat area Little India Brickfields this weekend. Diorang patut rasa takut duduk Malaysia. Come with weapons, come with semangat.
reason: Calls for ethnic riot at a specific location targeting Indian community with armed violence. Malay-English mix. Extremely dangerous incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Keganasan komunal merugikan semua pihak. Malaysia komited kepada keharmonian kaum. Jika ada isu, salurkan melalui dialog komuniti atau wakil rakyat.

input_text: Founder company MLM Fictional ni scam berjuta. Ni IC dia, alamat bini, kereta, sekolah anak dia. Kita kidnap anak dia, baru dia pulangkan duit kita. Who's in?
reason: Doxxing including family details and explicit call to kidnap children as leverage. Malay-English mix. Incitement to kidnapping.
suggested_rewrite: Skim MLM penipuan boleh dilaporkan kepada KPDN, Bank Negara, atau Suruhanjaya Sekuriti. Jangan sekali-kali ugut keluarga sesiapa.

input_text: Driver Grab yang raba penumpang perempuan tu, ni gambar IC dan plate number. Alamat rumah dia Taman Fictional, PJ. Jangan tunggu polis, let's go sekarang.
reason: Doxxing alleged sexual offender with IC and address, mobilizing vigilante mob. Malay-English code-switching. Risk of violence against potentially wrong target.
suggested_rewrite: Laporan gangguan seksual perlu dibuat segera kepada polis dan platform Grab. Hubungi Talian Kasih 15999 untuk sokongan mangsa.

input_text: PENTING: Jangan hantar anak perempuan ke Sekolah Fictional! Ada geng rogol beroperasi dari sekolah tu. Teachers semua tutup mata. Male teachers are all suspects. Sebarkan!
reason: Fabricated rape gang at a named school, falsely accuses all male teachers. Malay-English mix. Can cause panic and destroy reputations.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan keselamatan di sekolah, laporkan kepada pihak sekolah, PPD, atau polis. Jangan sebarkan tuduhan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Dia keluar penjara after rogol budak. Ni muka, nama, alamat baru. Welcome dia balik dengan cara kita sendiri. Make sure dia tak berani keluar rumah ever again.
reason: Doxxing a released sex offender with organized intimidation. Malay-English code-switching. Vigilante justice undermining legal system.
suggested_rewrite: Jika bimbang mengenai pesalah seks yang dibebaskan, hubungi polis mengenai perintah pengawasan. Sistem pemulihan perlu diperkukuhkan melalui saluran rasmi.

input_text: Mechanic tu tipu aku RM3000. Aku share semua info dia — nama, IC, alamat workshop, kereta. Sesiapa reti buat kacau, pecahkan cermin workshop dia tonight.
reason: Doxxing a business owner with personal details and inciting property destruction as revenge. Malay-English mix.
suggested_rewrite: Jika merasa ditipu oleh bengkel, buat aduan kepada Tribunal Tuntutan Pengguna atau KPDN. Simpan resit sebagai bukti.

input_text: Penduduk Taman Fictional dengar. Sesiapa nampak pekerja asing tanpa surat, tangkap dan kurung dalam stor rumah korang. We serah Imigresen bila kita ready.
reason: Instructs residents to commit false imprisonment of migrant workers. Malay-English mix. Citizen detention is a serious criminal offence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika nampak individu yang disyaki pendatang tanpa izin, hubungi Imigresen di 03-8000 8000. Menahan seseorang secara haram adalah kesalahan jenayah.

input_text: Anak jiran autistik tu bahaya. Patut dikurung rumah. Kalau parents dia tak buat apa, kita penduduk bertindak. Petition to halau them from this area dah ready.
reason: Organizes community action to expel family with autistic child. Malay-English mix. Disability-based discrimination with organized harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Kanak-kanak autistik memerlukan sokongan komuniti. Hubungi JKM atau Autism Society Malaysia untuk panduan hidup berjiran secara harmoni.

input_text: Masjid tu sumber radikalisasi. Imam ajar budak jadi pengganas. Serbu masjid tu, tangkap imam sendiri sebab polis won't do anything about it.
reason: False radicalization accusation, calls for vigilante raid on mosque and kidnapping of imam. Malay-English mix. Multiple severe violations.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan mengenai radikalisasi, hubungi PDRM atau Bahagian Pencegahan Jenayah. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri terhadap rumah-rumah ibadat.

input_text: Ustaz surau tu ajar anak benda salah. Tangkap dia, seret keluar, biar kita hukum sendiri. Polis lambat, kita jadi hakim. Tonight at 9pm we gather.
reason: Plans physical abduction and vigilante punishment of a religious teacher with specific time. Malay-English code-switching. Self-appointed justice.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan mengenai pengajaran agama, laporkan kepada Jabatan Agama Islam Negeri atau polis. Jangan ambil tindakan fizikal.

input_text: Doctor ni sengaja lambatkan rawatan patient Melayu supaya diorang mati. Nama Dr. Fictional, hospital Fictional. Orang Melayu boikot hospital ni! Spread the word!
reason: False accusation of ethnic-targeted murder by a named doctor. Malay-English mix. Can endanger the doctor and cause patients to avoid care.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan mengenai rawatan hospital boleh dibuat kepada KKM atau Majlis Perubatan Malaysia. Jangan buat tuduhan tidak berasas.
